message: Module error while trying to sync services, system def and utils with repo: git command failed: Command '['git', 'add', '.']' returned non-zero exit status 128. (CalledProcessError).
Module error while trying to update local copy of override_rooms_qr: failed to set up Google Sheets API: The read operation timed out (TimeoutError).
Module error while extracting presence patterns.: couldn't export dict to /config/scheduling/local_scheduling_files/occupancy.json: [Errno 13] Permission denied: '/config' (PermissionError).
